category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Bahrain BSMD registration, GSO energy-efficiency labelling, and GSO/IEC safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Bahrain Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Bahrain BSMD conformity/registration, GSO energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS, GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements, R-600a refrigerant handling, TRA radio approval (for connected models), and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与巴林BSMD符合性/注册、GSO能效标识及最低能效标准（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a制冷剂处理、TRA无线电核准（适用于联网型号）及在地进口商义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與巴林BSMD符合性/登記、GSO能效標識及最低能效標準（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a製冷劑處理、TRA無線電核准（適用於聯網型號）及在地進口商義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Bahrain BSMD requirements, GSO standards, energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS thresholds, refrigerant provisions, and importer/registration requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林BSMD要求、GSO标准、能效标识及最低能效标准门槛值、制冷剂条款及进口商/注册要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林BSMD要求、GSO標準、能效標識及最低能效標準門檻值、製冷劑條款及進口商/登記要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five main Bahrain compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety must align with the GSO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 standard accepted by BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate under MOIC) — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted and BSMD conformity/registration is required; (2) energy performance must meet the GSO energy-efficiency MEPS and carry the GSO Energy Efficiency Label, with the Chinese 1-to-5 grade not directly transferable; (3) the GSO energy label (Arabic content) must be affixed; (4) the appliance must be supplied through an in-country Bahraini importer/registrant who holds the conformity documentation; and (5) connected (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) models additionally require TRA type approval. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge/documentation against the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions must be verified. Voltage is 230 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V).
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大巴林合规差距：（1）电气安全须符合BSMD（隶属MOIC的巴林标准与计量局）所采纳的GSO版IEC 60335-2-24标准——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不会被自动接受，须办理BSMD符合性/注册；（2）能效须满足GSO能效最低能效标准（MEPS）并加贴GSO能效标识，中国1至5级评级不可直接套用；（3）须加贴GSO能效标签（含阿拉伯文内容）；（4）器具须经由持有符合性文件的巴林在地进口商/注册人供货；（5）联网（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）型号另须取得TRA型号核准。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件，但须核实充注量/文件是否符合GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款。供电电压为230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz与中国相同；额定电压与中国220 V不同）。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大巴林合規差距：（1）電氣安全須符合BSMD（隸屬MOIC的巴林標準與計量局）所採納的GSO版IEC 60335-2-24標準——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不會被自動接受，須辦理BSMD符合性/登記；（2）能效須滿足GSO能效最低能效標準（MEPS）並加貼GSO能效標識，中國1至5級評級不可直接套用；（3）須加貼GSO能效標籤（含阿拉伯文內容）；（4）器具須經由持有符合性文件的巴林在地進口商/登記人供貨；（5）聯網（Wi-Fi/藍牙）型號另須取得TRA型號核准。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件，但須核實充注量/文件是否符合GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款。供電電壓為230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz與中國相同；額定電壓與中國220 V不同）。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon material change to BSMD/GSO requirements
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (BSMD/MOIC, TRA), GSO standardization body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted.
